highlights.description: Rubric definitions with score anchors for consistent LLM-as-Judge evaluations
Judge metadata tracking (model, prompt, temperature, tokens)
Pairwise comparison mode as alternative to absolute scoring

added.description: Rubric and ScoreAnchor types for defining explicit scoring criteria
Range-based score anchors (e.g., 8-10 = Excellent)
DefaultPRDRubricSet with problem_definition, solution_clarity, success_metrics
JudgeMetadata type for tracking LLM model, provider, and prompt
TokenUsage tracking for evaluation cost monitoring
Observability trace/span links in JudgeMetadata
PairwiseComparison type for comparing two outputs
Position bias detection via swapped comparisons
ComputePairwiseResult for aggregating comparison results
ReferenceData and ReferenceDataset types for gold/expected data
Human annotation support with scores and labels
MultiJudgeResult for aggregating evaluations from multiple judges
Aggregation methods: mean, median, weighted, majority, conservative
Inter-judge agreement metrics and disagreement detection
Finding consolidation with severity-based deduplication
Judge, RubricID, and Reference fields in EvaluationReport

changed.description: Updated JSON Schema to include v0.2.0 types

tests.description: Unit tests for Rubric, PairwiseComparison, and MultiJudgeResult

highlights.description: Reusable evaluation framework for LLM-as-Judge and multi-agent workflows
InfoSec severity levels (Critical, High, Medium, Low) with configurable pass criteria
DAG-based report aggregation for multi-agent coordination

added.description: `evaluation` package with EvaluationReport, CategoryScore, Finding, Severity types
Category scoring with weighted scores (0-10) and pass/warn/fail status
PassCriteria and Decision types with configurable approval thresholds
EvaluationReport with metadata, categories, findings, and next steps
`summary` package with SummaryReport, TeamSection, TaskResult for GO/NO-GO checks
`combine` package with DAG-based topological sort using Kahn's algorithm
AggregateResults and AggregateWithDAG for multi-agent coordination
Box-format terminal renderer for summary reports
Detailed terminal renderer for evaluation reports with severity grouping
JSON Schema generation using invopop/jsonschema
Embedded schemas via `//go:embed` for runtime access
`sevaluation` CLI with render, check, validate, and schema commands

tests.description: Unit tests for evaluation criteria, DAG sorting, and summary reports

documentation.description: Example evaluation and summary reports in examples/

build.description: GitHub Actions workflows for CI, linting, and CodeQL analysis
Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates
